name: Iula
description_en: Iula knew grief well. Born on the slopes of Targon, it was there that she both found and lost her love. But as Pylas left her, Iula found strength to climb from the depths of that lost love, and vowed to stand against the demon who so desperately sought to feast on her misery.
description_fr: Iula connaissait bien le chagrin. Née sur les pentes de Targon, c'est là qu'elle a trouvé et perdu son amour. Mais alors que Pylas la quittait, Iula trouva la force de sortir des profondeurs de cet amour perdu et jura de s'opposer au démon qui cherchait si désespérément à se repaître de sa misère.
